verses.2: Many nations will go and say,
verses.3: and he will judge between many peoples,
verses.4: But every man will sit under his vine and under his fig tree.
verses.5: Indeed all the nations may walk in the name of their gods,
verses.7: and I will make that which was lame a remnant,
verses.8: You, tower of the flock, the hill of the daughter of Zion,
verses.9: Now why do you cry out aloud?
verses.10: Be in pain, and labor to give birth, daughter of Zion,
verses.11: Now many nations have assembled against you, that say,
verses.12: But they don’t know the thoughts of the LORD,
verses.13: Arise and thresh, daughter of Zion,
